description: Effort is plural (§5.13): each EffortLoad tags the method it was measured by. Tokens follow the spec's acronym casing (RPE, RIR, %1RM). external/internal is the closed EffortLoad.kind, not part of this open vocabulary.

tokens.label: Velocity-Based Training
tokens.description: Bar/movement velocity (or % velocity loss) as the effort signal.

tokens.label: Percent of 1RM
tokens.description: Load as a percent of one-rep max (also expressible as a relativeToThreshold load target).
